item.title:

Do you think Rory McIlroy is the now GREATEST
item.description:
Jamie Kennedy reposteó Jamie Kennedy @jamierkennedy · 22h Have your say…
Do you think Rory McIlroy is the now GREATEST ever European golfer? 344 votos · 1 hora restante 18 2 12 7 mil

item.title:
JustinRayGolf: Justin Ray @JustinRayGolf · 4h Jordan Spieth through 36 holes this week: *1-under-par *0 bogeys *4 double bogeys
He is
item.description:
Justin Ray @JustinRayGolf · 4h Jordan Spieth through 36 holes this week: *1-under-par *0 bogeys *4 double bogeys
He is the only player over the last 20 years on the PGA Tour to be under par, have 4+ doubles and 0 bogeys through 36 holes in any tournament. 17 49 932 66 mil

Justin Ray @JustinRayGolf · 4h En respuesta a @JustinRayGolf Thank you to follower @StefanScrafield for bringing this to my attention
I stopped digging at 20 years because I have a family 58 8 mil

item.title: JoshACarpenter: Josh Carpenter @JoshACarpenter · 4h Hogan at Merion. Nicklaus at Baltusrol. DeChambeau at Chapultepec. Cita LIV Golf @li
